_comment: Example of an honest CMDB scrape — every component declared 'candidate' so the operator knows it needs review. POST this body to /api/v1/ingestion/cmdb. Replace application_id with a real UUID from your instance (e.g. one created by methodology-demo.json).

components.name: newly-discovered-mq
components.description: ActiveMQ broker — found by overnight CMDB scrape, not yet reviewed
